economic_notes: Band holds equity interests in multiple government business enterprises and partnerships including forestry (Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Forestry LP), property management (Centre Creek LP), environmental services (Seven Generations Environmental Services Ltd.), and tribal management (Ts'elxweyeqx Tribe LP). Short term investments held with First Nation Finance Authority at 4.80% and GICs with RBC at 3.45%.
notes: Fiscal year is 2023 (year ended March 31, 2023). Eight entities accounted for on modified equity basis as government business enterprises/partnerships including forestry, property, environmental and tribal management entities. Prior year (2022) revenue of $12.7M was unusually large — likely due to a large one-time 'Other' revenue item of $11.5M in 2022 vs $311K in 2023, possibly a land claim or settlement. CMHC of $32,155 included in total_government_transfers alongside ISC funding of $975,499. No schedule of remuneration provided. Distributions expense of $38,814 in 2023 vs $2,210,044 in 2022 also notable. Assets under construction of $222,545 included in TCA net book value.
